permits.description: Remove decking fasteners. Separate deck surface planks from framing. Remove and dispose of old decking.Install wood decking with favorable site conditions. Re-frame and widen structure by 1ft. Layout and install 6 inwide decking on newly installed deck support framing. Fabricate decking and secure with corrosion resistant, flush mount decking screws.
permits.score_reasons: keyword: framing; permit completed; all permits completed
